title: cousinia calocephala subsp. asterocephala
intro: Cousinia calocephala subsp. asterocephala, also known as Cousinia asterocephala, is a plant species belonging to the genus Cousinia in the family Asteraceae, which is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cousinia calocephala subsp. asterocephala include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional medicine. Cousinia calocephala subsp. asterocephala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
